name: evennia
description: Evennia MUD game development skills — 28 comprehensive skills for learning and building with Evennia. Covers typeclasses, commands, attributes, tags, scripts, locks, channels, command sets, objects, rooms, exits, characters, accounts, prototypes, default commands, help system, EvMenu, EvEditor, nicks, coding utils, sessions, signals, ticker/monitor/on-demand handlers, REST API, and web admin.

interface.shortDescription: Learn and build MUD games with Evennia — 28 skills
interface.longDescription: A comprehensive skill set for learning and developing with Evennia, the open-source Python MU* creation system. Phase 1: browse documentation, typeclasses, commands, attributes, tags, scripts, locks, channels, command sets. Phase 2: objects, rooms, exits, characters, accounts, prototypes, default commands, help system, EvMenu, EvEditor, nicks, coding utils, sessions, signals, ticker/monitor/on-demand handlers, REST API, web admin.
defaultPrompt: Read the Evennia documentation page by page
Build a custom command for my MUD game
Set up a background script with timer
